violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the receiving, is still not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The prep sink, dishwasher, and 3-bay sink are still lacking air gaps. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gaps must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The flooring in the dish room is in poor repair and is constructed of cement (as well as the flooring near the ovens) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Coving tiles in areas are cracked and a section of coving under the dishwasher is crumbling. Physical facilities must be constructed of proper materials and be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The door to the outside, located in receiving, is still not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

The prep sink, dishwasher, and 3-bay sink are still lacking air gaps. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gaps must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The flooring in the dish room is in poor repair and is constructed of cement (as well as the flooring near the ovens) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Coving tiles in areas are cracked and a section of coving under the dishwasher is crumbling. Physical facilities must be constructed of proper materials and be maintained in good repair Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The door to the outside, located in receiving, is still not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
A couple of the ovens observed in poor repair and are not currently being used. Equipment must remain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Can opener is not in good repair and must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The prep sink, dishwasher, and 3-bay sink are still lacking air gaps. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Proper air gaps must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The flooring in the dishwasher room and under the ovens remains in poor repair. In addition, a section of the coving area under the dishwashing area is in poor repair, crumbling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and receiving, still are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Several pieces of equipment remain in poor repair. The dishwasher and the large walk-in cooler are not functioning. The gasket of the walk-in cooler is splitting away from the door. In addition, the handles of the small walk-in freezer and the walk-in cooler do not function properly resulting in the doors not closing all of the way. All equipment must remain in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The prep sink, dishwasher, and 3-bay sink are still lacking proper air gaps. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Proper air gaps must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The flooring in the dish room and under the ovens remains in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside of the cafeteria. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and receiving, are still not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Both grab n go units are currently not functioning and are not being used. Service ticket has been placed and units are not to be used until they are maintaining consistent temperatures at/below 41 degrees F. Dishwasher is currently not functional and is being serviced. 3-bay sink is being used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Prep sink, dishwasher, and 3-bay sink are still lacking proper air gaps. Proper air gaps must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The flooring in the dish room and under the ovens remains in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher still do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and receiving area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler is in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. In addition, the dishwasher and a cold hold unit (large grab n go unit) are not operating. The 3-bay sink must be used to wash, rinse, and sanitize all food equipment/utensils until the dishwasher is repaired. Cold hold unit must not be used for TCS foods until it has been serviced and is maintaining consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
The prep sink, dishwasher, and 3-bay sink are still lacking proper air gaps. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher do not have proper coving. There are sections that have disintegrated leaving unsealed cement. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The flooring in a couple of areas (under and near dishwasher, under the ovens) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and receiving areas, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
Can opener is not in good repair. Blade section observed to be peeling. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the vents above the ovens observed to have an accumulation of dust and must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
Dishwasher, prep sink, and 3-bay sink are lacking proper air gaps. Proper air gaps must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The floor and wall junctures in areas of the kitchen (including behind the dishwasher) have coving tiles that are cracked or missing. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The flooring under the steamers/ovens is in poor repair. In addition, the cover to the grease trap is heavily rusted. These areas are no longer able to be cleaned properly. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair and made of materials that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
